exchange-argument.summary: Variational proof that geometric marking is uniquely LB-optimal

geometric-dominance.summary: Direct casework on geometric marking; LB creates 1:2:4:...:2^n pieces, largest dominates

induction-on-n.last_note: Case B sandwich case complete; proof solved
induction-on-n.summary: Induction via reciprocal recurrence 1/c(n) = 1/c(n-1) + 2^{-n}; reduction to smaller game

n2-explicit-casework.summary: Direct 4-case exhaustive analysis for n=2, then induction

pairing-interleave.summary: Dyadic pairing structure; XY copy strategy creates interleaved pairs, LB takes one from each tier

ratio-based-induction.summary: Induction via ratio threshold 2; XY halves if ratio>2, clones if <=2
